assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 (lines 108-116): 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205'. Explicitly states 'Check out the **Target Branch** `TC-9005` (NOT main)'.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 (line 222): 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table"'. Also states 'The PR targets `TC-9005` via `--base TC-9005`, NOT main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 (lines 115-116): 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and 'The task branch is named `TC-9205` (the task issue ID), distinct from the target branch `TC-9005`.'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 4 (lines 54-103): Section 4.1 inspects 'migration/src/lib.rs' via get_symbols_overview and 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' via get_symbols_overview. Section 4.2 inspects 'entity/src/advisory.rs' via get_symbols_overview. All three files are explicitly mentioned for pre-implementation inspection.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 (line 210): 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"'. Uses double quotes instead of single quotes but is functionally equivalent.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 (lines 197-204): Subject line 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' follows Conventional Commits (type=feat, scope=migration). Footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8: '**Target Branch**: TC-9005 (feature branch, NOT main)'. Step 1 (line 26): '**Target Branch**: TC-9005'. Step 5 (line 108): 'Check out the **Target Branch** `TC-9005` (NOT main)'. Step 10 (line 233): 'the Target Branch specified in the task is `TC-9005` (the parent feature branch)'.
